ddls:
CREATE TABLE "arrest_records" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrest record */,
  "arrest_date" TEXT /* Date the arrest was made */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the arrestee was booked */,
  "arrestee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrestee's ID */,
  "arrest_location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the arrest was made */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge associated with the arrest */,
  "arresting_officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ID of the arresting officer */,
  "incident_number" TEXT /* Unique incident number for the arrest */,
  "arrest_type" TEXT /* Type of arrest (e.g., traffic stop, pedestrian stop, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_arrestee_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrestee_id") REFERENCES arrestees ("arrestee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_arresting_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("arresting_officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arrest_records_arrest_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("arrest_location_id") REFERENCES arrest_locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrestees" (
  "arrestee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arrestee */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the arrestee (M, F, etc.) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the arrestee */,
  "address_city" TEXT /* City of the arrestee's address */,
  "address_state" TEXT /* State of the arrestee's address */,
  "address_zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the arrestee's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the arrestee */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the arrestee */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver license number of the arrestee */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the arrestee */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the arrestee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrestee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "location_address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "location_city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "location_state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "location_zip" INTEGER /* Zip code of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., public, private, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charges" (
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge */,
  "charge_code" INTEGER /* Code of the charge */,
  "charge_wording" TEXT /* Wording of the charge */,
  "charge_level" TEXT /* Level of the charge (e.g., MB, MA, FS, MC) */,
  "statute_code" TEXT /* Statute code associated with the charge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dispositions" (
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disposition */,
  "charge_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the charge ID */,
  "disposition_date" TEXT /* Date the disposition was made */,
  "disposition_type" TEXT /* Type of disposition (e.g., None, COMM, DISM, CONV) */,
  "disposition_details" TEXT /* Details of the disposition */,
  "court_case_number" TEXT /* Court case number associated with the disposition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disposition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dispositions_charge_id FOREIGN KEY ("charge_id") REFERENCES charges ("charge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case outcome */,
  "disposition_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the disposition ID */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was determined */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., Dismissed, Convicted) */,
  "sentence" TEXT /* Sentence or penalty imposed */,
  "probation_terms" TEXT /* Terms of probation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_outcomes_disposition_id FOREIGN KEY ("disposition_id") REFERENCES dispositions ("disposition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "law_enforcement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of unit (e.g., local, state, federal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, investigator, admin) */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_performed" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES arrest_records ("arrest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit the officer belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_officers_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES law_enforcement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arrest_officers" (
  "arrest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the arrest ID */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the officer ID */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the arrest (e.g., arresting officer, assisting officer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arrest_id", "officer_id")
)
